chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.D-229 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.09.2025 Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh a/w Saeed Ahmed Jokhio, Mukhtiarkar Taluka Sijawal. -.-.-.-.-.- Through this petition, the petitioners have sought for the following relief(s): a) To direct the Respondents to establish the Police Station instead of Police Post at Kot Lal Bux Mahesar, Taluka Sijawal Junejo, in the interest of public at large. b) To direct the Respondents to restore the Check Post of “Unar Pull” PS Sijawal, in order to maintain law and order situation. Mr. Riaz Hussain Mirani, advocate holds brief for Mr. Khurram Jaah Mahesar, advocate for the petitioner requests for adjournment on the ground that the latter learned counsel is unwell. Learned Addl. A. G draws attention of the Court towards comments furnished by the respondents No.6 & 7 and submits that purpose of petition has been served and seeks its disposal. Before parting with the order it would be appropriate to reproduce the operative para of the comments submitted by the respondent No.6, which is reproduced as under: “In this regard, DSP/SDPO Mirokhan submitted such factual report disclosing therein that for the security purpose I/C alongwith police personnel are deployed at P.P Unar Pull with a Police Mobile while already Police Post is established, functional/open for hours and another police post of village Kot Lal Bux Mahesar is just Kilometers away from PP Unar Pull, Police Post of village Hayat Gopang is just Kilometers away from Police Post Unar Pull as well as Police Post Gul Shah is also just kilometers away from Police Post Unar Pull which police posts are open for hours and a Police Post of Pir Musafir of District Larkana is also Kilometers away from P.P Unar Pull.

G draws attention of the Court towards comments furnished by the respondents No.6 & 7 and submits that purpose of petition has been served and seeks its disposal. Before parting with the order it would be appropriate to reproduce the operative para of the comments submitted by the respondent No.6, which is reproduced as under: “In this regard, DSP/SDPO Mirokhan submitted such factual report disclosing therein that for the security purpose I/C alongwith police personnel are deployed at P.P Unar Pull with a Police Mobile while already Police Post is established, functional/open for hours and another police post of village Kot Lal Bux Mahesar is just Kilometers away from PP Unar Pull, Police Post of village Hayat Gopang is just Kilometers away from Police Post Unar Pull as well as Police Post Gul Shah is also just kilometers away from Police Post Unar Pull which police posts are open for hours and a Police Post of Pir Musafir of District Larkana is also Kilometers away from P.P Unar Pull. There is also day and night Police mobile patrolling within jurisdiction. Special Police teams also use to patrol in the jurisdiction to prevent crimes. DSP/SDPO Mirokhan personally visits & check the attendance of deployed Police Staff at PPs & Police Post Unar Pull on daily basis.” Accordingly and in view of above, instant petition is disposed of. A copy of order shall be sent by fax to SSP Kamber Shahdadkot for compliance. A copy of order shall be provided to learned Addl. A. G for correspondence and compliance. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
